global_description: A small, compact songbird with a vibrant blue plumage covering most of its body. It has a conical, pointed beak and dark eyes. The wings and tail are medium-length and the bird has a slightly rounded body shape.

part_details.plumage: Bright blue feathers covering the head, back, and wings, with a slightly iridescent sheen.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, and pointed, typically dark gray or black.
part_details.eyes: Small, round, and dark, set on either side of the head.
part_details.wings: Medium-length, blue with darker tips, folded along the body.
part_details.tail: Short to medium, blue with a slightly forked shape.

spatial_relations: The beak is positioned at the front of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
